title: Structure Template Feature
description: Places a structure in the world. The structure must be stored as a .mcstructure file in the "structures" subdirectory of a behavior pack.

structure_template_feature_definition.title: Structure Template Feature Definition
structure_template_feature_definition.description: A single Structure Template Feature Definition.

identifier.description: The identifier for this feature. The identifier must include a namespace and must match the filename.

structure_name.description: Reference to the structure to place (namespace:structure_name).

adjustment_radius.description: Optional. Radius to search for valid placement within.

facing_direction.description: Optional. Direction the structure faces. Default is random.

rotate_around_center.description: Optional. If true, rotate the structure around its center.

ground_level.description: Optional. Specifies which Y coordinate of the structure is considered its ground level. This value determines which layer of the structure is checked by the "grounded" and "leveled" constraints and is used as a downward vertical offset during placement. If the value exceeds the structure's height, it is clamped to the maximum valid value and a content warning is emitted. Defaults to 0.

grounded.description: Optional. When specified, ensures the structure is on the ground.

leveled.description: Optional. When specified, ensures the structure's ground level is placed on mostly flat terrain.

max_steepness.description: Optional. Maximum allowed height difference between the placement position and terrain samples taken halfway along each side of the structure. A valid terrain sample consists of a solid block with a non-solid block above it. Defaults to 2.

unburied.description: Optional. When specified, ensures the structure has air above it.

block_allowlist.description: Optional. Blocks allowed to intersect with structure.

block_whitelist.description: Optional. Blocks that must intersect with structure.

only_check_intersection_for_motion_block.description: Optional. If true, only motion-blocking blocks within the structure are checked for intersections with blocks in "block_allowlist|block_whitelist". If false, all blocks in the structure except empty ones are checked for intersections, including air.
